artifact_summary: Interface for High Serv. Pump No.1 showing active Fail To Stop alarm and speed feedback graph.
artifact_blurb: A SCADA Variable Speed Drive Faceplate monitoring High Serv. Pump No.1, featuring a dual-panel layout with an active Fail To Stop alarm indicator on the left and a real-time Speed Feedback graph on the right.
replacement_text: A SCADA Variable Speed Drive Faceplate monitoring High Serv. Pump No.1, featuring a dual-panel layout with an active Fail To Stop alarm indicator on the left and a real-time Speed Feedback graph on the right.
normalized_text: A SCADA Variable Speed Drive Faceplate monitoring High Serv. Pump No.1, featuring a dual-panel layout with an active Fail To Stop alarm indicator on the left and a real-time Speed Feedback graph on the right.
